topics.pages_mn: Study and Work — Unit: Teens Today (leisure, school clubs, feelings)

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct verb: 'Ganaa ___ English at a language club after school.'
questions.explanation_mn: After school → зуршил (present simple). Ganaa 3‑р бие ганц тоо тул ‑es залгана → **studies**. 'study' нь ‑s дутуу.

questions.stem_mn: 'Be quiet! The class ___ a test right now.'
questions.explanation_mn: Right now → present continuous. 'The class' ганц тоо → **is taking**. 'takes' нь simple тул буруу.

questions.stem_mn: 'Teenagers ___ a lot of time online every day.'
questions.explanation_mn: Every day → simple. 'Teenagers' олон тоо тул ‑s залгахгүй → **spend**. 'spends' нь ганц тоонд хэрэглэгддэг.

questions.stem_mn: Which sentence is grammatically correct?
choices: She watch videos about study tips.
She watching videos about study tips.
She are watching videos about study tips.
She watches videos about study tips.
questions.explanation_mn: She (3‑р бие ганц тоо) → **watches** (‑es). Бусад нь ‑s дутуу эсвэл be туслах үйл буруу (she are…).

questions.stem_mn: 'The school magazine ___ by students every term.' (write)
questions.explanation_mn: Passive present simple = is + V3. write → **written**. 'is write' нь V3 биш тул буруу; 'writes' идэвхтэй хэв.

questions.stem_mn: Which passive sentence is correct?
choices: Snacks are sell in the school canteen.
Snacks are sold in the school canteen.
Snacks are selling in the school canteen.
Snacks is sold in the school canteen.
questions.explanation_mn: Passive = are + V3 (**sold**). 'are sell' V3 биш; 'are selling' идэвхтэй; 'is' олон тоонд буруу.

questions.stem_mn: 'Anna usually reads at home, but today she ___ in the library.'
questions.explanation_mn: 'Today' нь ердийн зуршлаас өөр, түр зуурын үйлдэл → present continuous: **is reading**. 'reads' нь зуршлыг заана.

questions.stem_mn: Find the sentence with NO mistakes.
choices: Our club organising a concert, and tickets are sell online.
Our club is organising a concert, and tickets are sold online.
Our club is organise a concert, and tickets is sold online.
Our club organise a concert, and tickets are selling online.
questions.explanation_mn: 'is organising' (continuous active) + 'are sold' (passive V3) хоёулаа зөв. Бусад нь be дутуу, V3 биш, эсвэл тоо таарахгүй (tickets is).

questions.stem_mn: 'Look — the classroom walls ___ right now.' (paint)
questions.explanation_mn: Right now + идэвхгүй → present continuous passive: are being + V3 (**painted**). Walls олон тоо → are. 'are painting' идэвхтэй хэв.

questions.stem_mn: Which sentence describes a general fact (not an action happening now)?
choices: Water is boiling on the stove.
The teacher is explaining the rule.
questions.explanation_mn: Ерөнхий үнэн → present simple: '**Water boils at 100 degrees.**' Бусад нь яг одоо болж буй үйлдэл (continuous).

topics.title_mn: Present perfect & modals for advice (Unit 2: Learning for the Future)
topics.pages_mn: Study and Work — Unit: Learning for the Future (study skills, lifelong learning)

questions.stem_mn: They ___ completed the training course.
questions.explanation_mn: 'They' дараа have. Present perfect = have + V3: 'They have completed...'

questions.stem_mn: I have worked here ___ five years.
questions.explanation_mn: 'five years' бол хугацааны урт тул for хэрэглэнэ.

questions.stem_mn: She has studied English ___ 2020.
questions.explanation_mn: 2020 бол тодорхой эхлэл цэг тул since хэрэглэнэ.

questions.stem_mn: You ___ ask your teacher for help.
questions.explanation_mn: Модаль should дараа шууд үндсэн үйл үг (ask) орно, to-гүй. 'should to' буруу.

questions.stem_mn: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation_mn: 'in 2018' тодорхой өнгөрсөн цаг тул past simple 'met'. Present perfect тодорхой цагтай тохирохгүй.

questions.stem_mn: ___ you ever studied abroad?
questions.explanation_mn: Туршлага асуухад present perfect: 'Have you ever studied abroad?' 'you' тул have.

questions.stem_mn: The certificates ___ awarded to the graduates.
questions.explanation_mn: 'certificates' олон тоо тул have been + V3 (awarded). Present perfect passive = have/has been + V3.

questions.stem_mn: You'd better ___ late for the interview.
questions.explanation_mn: had better дараа үндсэн үйл үг, үгүйсгэлд 'had better not + verb': 'had better not be'. to залгахгүй.

questions.stem_mn: Which sentence is INCORRECT?
choices: I have known him for a long time.
I have known him since we were children.
I have known him since three years.
I have known him for years.
questions.explanation_mn: 'since three years' буруу — 'three years' бол хугацааны урт тул for хэрэглэнэ. since бол эхлэл цэгт (since we were children).

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct sentence.
choices: You ought to update your CV, and you should to add new skills.
You ought to update your CV, and you should add new skills.
You ought update your CV, and you should adding new skills.
You ought to updating your CV, and you should add new skills.
questions.explanation_mn: ought TO + үндсэн үйл үг (update), should + үндсэн үйл үг (add, to-гүй). 'should to add', 'ought update', 'updating' бүгд буруу.

topics.title_mn: Future forms & questions (Unit 3: Jobs and Society)
topics.pages_mn: Study and Work — Unit: Jobs and Society (careers, community service)

questions.stem_mn: Зөв хэлбэрийг сонго: 'She ___ the presentation next week.' (present / give)
questions.explanation_mn: Future simple: will + үйл үгийн үндсэн хэлбэр (give). will-ийн дараа -s залгадаггүй, past хэлбэр (gave) хэрэглэдэггүй.

questions.stem_mn: 'The printer isn't working.' 'Don't worry, I ___ fix it.' — Ярианы агшинд гаргасан санал тул аль нь тохирох вэ?
questions.explanation_mn: Ярианы агшинд гэнэт гаргасан шийдвэр/санал = will. Урьдчилан төлөвлөсөн зүйл биш тул be going to тохирохгүй.

questions.stem_mn: '___ to become a doctor?' Subject-ийг асуух зөв хэлбэрийг сонго. (Хэн эмч болохыг хүсдэг вэ?)
questions.explanation_mn: Subject question-д do/does хэрэглэдэггүй. 'Who' нь ганц тоо тул үйл үг 'wants' болно. 'Who does want' болон 'Who do want' буруу.

questions.stem_mn: 'By the time you arrive, the meeting ___.' (finish)
questions.explanation_mn: 'By the time...' нь ирээдүйн нэг цэгээс өмнө дуусахыг заана тул future perfect: will have + V3 (finished). 'will has' болон 'will have finish' буруу.

questions.stem_mn: Object question үүсгэ: '___ for the position last week?' (who / you / recommend) — чи хэнийг санал болгосон бэ?
questions.explanation_mn: Object-ийг асуухад did + үндсэн хэлбэр: 'Who did you recommend?'. 'Who did you recommended' давхар past тул буруу; 'Who recommended you' нь subject question болж утга өөрчлөгдөнө.

questions.stem_mn: 'The new policy ___ next month.' (announce — passive)
questions.explanation_mn: Бодлого өөрөө зарлагдах тул passive: will be + V3 (announced). 'will announce' нь active, 'will be announce' нь V3 биш тул буруу.

questions.stem_mn: Үгсийн сан: 'A person who works without pay to help the community is a ___.'
questions.explanation_mn: 'volunteer' = сайн дурын ажилтан (цалингүйгээр нийгэмд туслах хүн). 'employer' = ажил олгогч, 'applicant' = өргөдөл гаргагч, 'supervisor' = удирдагч.

questions.stem_mn: Аль өгүүлбэр БУРУУ бэ?
choices: By June, they will have finished the project.
The report will be sent tomorrow.
questions.explanation_mn: 'Who did call?' буруу — subject-ийг асууж байгаа тул did хэрэггүй, зөв нь 'Who called the manager?'. Бусад гурав нь зөв (object question, future perfect, future simple passive).

questions.stem_mn: 'By 2040, thousands of jobs ___ by automation.' (replace — future perfect passive)
questions.explanation_mn: Future perfect passive: will have been + V3 (replaced). 'will have replaced' нь active, 'will be replaced' нь future simple passive тул 'By 2040...' -тэй бүрэн нийцэхгүй.

questions.stem_mn: Уншаад гүйцээ: 'Saraa has decided to volunteer at the local shelter. She has already filled out the form.' → 'She ___ at the shelter next weekend.'
questions.explanation_mn: Аль хэдийн шийдэж, маягтаа бөглөсөн = урьдчилан төлөвлөсөн тул be going to: 'is going to volunteer'. 'will volunteering' дүрмийн алдаа, 'will have volunteered' нь future perfect тул утгад тохирохгүй.

topics.title_mn: Relative clauses (Unit 4: Roots of Mongolian Identity)
topics.pages_mn: Cultures and Traditions — Unit: Roots of Mongolian Identity (traditions, symbolism)

questions.stem_mn: Fill in the blank: 'A herder is a person ___ takes care of animals.'
questions.explanation_mn: Herder бол хүн тул who ашиглана. which нь эд юмсыг заадаг.

questions.stem_mn: Fill in the blank: 'Airag is a drink ___ is made from mare's milk.'
questions.explanation_mn: Airag (айраг) бол ундаа буюу юм тул which (эсвэл that). who нь зөвхөн хүнд хэрэглэгддэг.

questions.stem_mn: Fill in the blank: 'The steppe is the vast grassland ___ nomads live.'
questions.explanation_mn: Steppe (тал нутаг) бол газар тул where. which нь юмыг заана, харин энд байршлыг заасан.

questions.stem_mn: Fill in the blank: 'Tsagaan Sar is the festival ___ Mongolians celebrate the lunar new year.'
questions.explanation_mn: Tsagaan Sar бол баяр буюу цаг хугацааны үе тул when. where нь газрыг заадаг тул буруу.

questions.stem_mn: Which sentence is INCORRECT?
choices: The man who won the wrestling is my uncle.
The man which won the wrestling is my uncle.
The man that won the wrestling is my uncle.
The horse that won the race is famous.
questions.explanation_mn: 'The man which...' буруу. Man бол хүн тул which биш, who эсвэл that хэрэглэнэ.

questions.stem_mn: Fill in the blank: 'The ovoo is a place ___ travelers add stones and pray.'
questions.explanation_mn: Ovoo бол газар тул where. when нь цаг хугацааг заадаг тул энд буруу.

questions.stem_mn: Fill in the blank: 'The morin khuur, ___ means "horse-head fiddle", is Mongolia's national instrument.'
questions.explanation_mn: Morin khuur бол юм тул which. Энэ нь non-defining clause (хоёр талдаа таслалтай) тул that хэрэглэхгүй, зөвхөн which.

questions.stem_mn: Which sentence is punctuated correctly?
choices: Naadam, which is held every July, attracts many visitors.
Naadam which is held every July attracts many visitors.
Naadam, that is held every July, attracts many visitors.
Naadam, when is held every July, attracts many visitors.
questions.explanation_mn: Зөв: non-defining clause 'which is held every July' хоёр талдаа таслалтай. that биш which; when нь энд утгагүй.

questions.stem_mn: Fill in the blank: 'Autumn is the season ___ herders prepare for the harsh winter.'
questions.explanation_mn: Autumn (намар) бол улирал буюу цаг хугацаа тул when. where нь газрыг заадаг тул буруу.

questions.stem_mn: Combine into one sentence: 'This is the deel. My grandfather wore it at Naadam.' Choose the best sentence.
choices: This is the deel which my grandfather wore at Naadam.
This is the deel who my grandfather wore at Naadam.
This is the deel where my grandfather wore at Naadam.
This is the deel when my grandfather wore at Naadam.
questions.explanation_mn: Deel бол юм тул which (эсвэл that). who (хүн), where (газар), when (цаг) нь энд буруу.

topics.title_mn: Clauses of reason & time (Unit 5: Cultures Around the World)
topics.pages_mn: Cultures and Traditions — Unit: Cultures Around the World (customs, lifestyles)

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct word: We celebrate this day ___ our long history.
questions.explanation_mn: 'our long history' бол нэр үг хэллэг тул `because of` зөв. `because` ард бол бүтэн өгүүлбэр хэрэгтэй. (`due to` нь ихэвчлэн 'to be'-ийн ард нэр үгийг тодотгодог тул энд үйл үг 'celebrate'-тэй хэрэглэхэд `because of` илүү зохимжтой.)

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct word: ___ it rained, the outdoor ceremony moved inside.
questions.explanation_mn: 'it rained' бол эзэн (it) + үйл (rained) бүхий бүтэн өгүүлбэр тул `Because` зөв. `Because of`, `Due to` ард нэр үг ирнэ.

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct word: We always clean the house ___ the New Year begins.
questions.explanation_mn: Гэрээ цэвэрлэх нь шинэ жил эхлэхээс өмнө болдог тул `before` зөв. `because of`, `due to` бол шалтгаан заадаг.

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct verb form: After I ___ from university, I will travel to learn about other cultures.
questions.explanation_mn: Цаг хугацааны гишүүн өгүүлбэрт (`after` ард) ирээдүйг одоо цагаар илэрхийлнэ тул `graduate` зөв. 'After I will graduate' бол алдаа.

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct word: ___ the tourists were taking photos, the locals were preparing a feast.
questions.explanation_mn: Хоёр үйл (were taking, were preparing) нэгэн зэрэг үргэлжилж байгаа тул `While` зөв.

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct word: The concert was cancelled ___ a power cut.
questions.explanation_mn: 'a power cut' бол нэр үг тул `due to` зөв. `because` ард бол бүтэн өгүүлбэр хэрэгтэй.

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct word: ___ the guest arrived, the host offered a bowl of tea.
questions.explanation_mn: 'arrived' бол агшин зуурын (цэг) үйл тул `When` зөв. `While` бол үргэлжилсэн үйлд ордог.

questions.stem_mn: Which sentence is INCORRECT?
choices: Because of the storm, the parade was cancelled.
While she was cooking, he set the table.
We left early because we were tired.
When I will get to Japan, I will try sushi.
questions.explanation_mn: Цаг хугацааны гишүүн өгүүлбэрт `will` орохгүй. Зөв нь 'When I get to Japan, I will try sushi.' Бусад гурав нь зөв.

questions.stem_mn: Which sentence is CORRECT?
choices: The match was delayed because heavy rain.
The match was delayed due the heavy rain.
The match was delayed because of heavy rain.
The match was delayed because of it rained.
questions.explanation_mn: `because of` + нэр үг (heavy rain) тул гурав дахь нь зөв. 'because heavy rain' буруу (өгүүлбэр хэрэгтэй), 'due the' буруу (`due to`), 'because of it rained' буруу (because of ард өгүүлбэр орохгүй).

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct word: The lights suddenly went out ___ the shaman was performing the ritual.
questions.explanation_mn: 'was performing' бол үргэлжилсэн (past continuous) үйл, түүний явцад гэрэл унтарсан тул `while` зөв. `due to`, `because of` бол шалтгаан заадаг.

topics.title_mn: Past simple vs present perfect; infinitives (Unit 6: Language in Mind)
topics.pages_mn: Cultures and Traditions — Unit: Language in Mind (stories, heritage)

questions.stem_mn: We ___ Tsagaan Sar with our relatives last week.
questions.explanation_mn: «last week» тодорхой өнгөрсөн цаг тул `past simple`: celebrated.

questions.stem_mn: Long ago, storytellers ___ legends from memory.
questions.explanation_mn: tell тогтмол бус үйл үг тул past simple нь «told» (telled биш).

questions.stem_mn: I have ___ finished reading this folk tale.
questions.explanation_mn: «just» нь `present perfect`-тэй хамт орно; yesterday/ago/last week бол past simple-ийн тэмдэг үг.

questions.stem_mn: She has ___ many countries to study their traditions.
questions.explanation_mn: have/has-ийн дараа V3 орно: has + visited.

questions.stem_mn: My little sister enjoys ___ traditional songs.
questions.explanation_mn: «enjoy» нь `gerund` авдаг: enjoy singing. «enjoy to sing» буруу.

questions.stem_mn: They want ___ more about their ancestors' customs.
questions.explanation_mn: «want» нь `infinitive` авдаг: want to learn.

questions.stem_mn: We ___ the History Museum yesterday.
questions.explanation_mn: «yesterday» тул `past simple`: visited. Present perfect-ийг «yesterday»-тэй хэрэглэдэггүй.

questions.stem_mn: Which sentence is correct?
choices: I have seen that ritual last year.
I have saw that ritual last year.
I saw that ritual last year.
I seen that ritual last year.
questions.explanation_mn: «last year» тодорхой өнгөрсөн цаг тул `past simple`: «I saw ... last year.» «have seen ... last year» болон «have saw»/«seen» ганцаараа буруу.

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct sentence.
choices: We finished to decorate the ger.
We enjoy to decorate the ger.
questions.explanation_mn: finish + gerund = finished decorating. «want» дараа to + V, «enjoy» дараа V-ing болохыг санаарай — бусад нь буруу.

questions.stem_mn: Read: «Bat has studied Mongolian calligraphy since 2018. Last month he won a prize.» Which sentence is TRUE?
choices: Bat won a prize this week.
Bat has won a prize last month.
questions.explanation_mn: «has studied ... since 2018» нь 2018-аас одоог хүртэл үргэлжилж буйг заана тул одоо ч сурч байна. «Last month he won» бол past simple — тодорхой өнгөрсөн.

topics.pages_mn: Mother Nature and Wellness — Unit: Nature Conservation (pollution, environment)

questions.stem_mn: Зөв идэвхгүй хэлбэрийг сонго: 'Trees ___ planted to clean the air.'
questions.explanation_mn: must + be + V3 (planted). Бусад нь be дутуу эсвэл буруу хэлбэр.

questions.stem_mn: Зөв үгийг сонго: 'There are ___ animals in the forest.'
questions.explanation_mn: animals тоологдох олон тоо → many. much, little, a little нь тоологдохгүй нэртэй.

questions.stem_mn: Зөв үгийг сонго: 'We should not waste ___ water.'
questions.explanation_mn: water тоологдохгүй → much. many, a few, few нь тоологдох нэртэй.

questions.stem_mn: Зөв үгийг сонго: 'Only ___ species of birds are left here.'
questions.explanation_mn: species тоологдох → a few. a little, much, little нь тоологдохгүй нэртэй.

questions.stem_mn: Зөв үгийг сонго: 'There is very ___ rain in the Gobi Desert.'
questions.explanation_mn: rain тоологдохгүй, мөн 'бараг байхгүй' утгатай тул → little. few, many, a few нь тоологдох нэртэй.

questions.stem_mn: Зөв өгүүлбэрийг сонго: 'Rivers ___ by factory waste.'
questions.explanation_mn: should not + be + polluted (V3). Бусад нь be дутуу, V1 (pollute), эсвэл 'to' илүү.

questions.stem_mn: Аль өгүүлбэрт алдаа байна вэ?
questions.explanation_mn: 'Much trees' алдаатай — trees тоологдох тул 'Many trees' байх ёстой. Бусад өгүүлбэрүүд зөв.

questions.stem_mn: Уншаад зөв идэвхгүй модалыг сонго: 'Air pollution is a big problem. It ___ by planting more trees and using fewer cars.'
questions.explanation_mn: can + be + reduced (V3). Утгаараа 'бууруулж болно' тул can. Бусад нь be дутуу, V1, эсвэл 'to' илүү.

questions.stem_mn: Уншаад зөв хосыг сонго: 'The lake is almost dry. There is ___ water and only ___ fish are still alive.'
questions.explanation_mn: water тоологдохгүй, бараг алга → little. fish (энд олон тоо, тоологдох) → a few. Тиймээс 'little ... a few'.

questions.stem_mn: Байгаль хамгааллын талаарх бүрэн зөв өгүүлбэрийг сонго.
choices: Much bottles can be recycled, but few effort is made.
Many bottles can be recycled, but little effort is made.
Many bottles can recycled, but little effort is made.
Many bottles can be recycled, but few effort is made.
questions.explanation_mn: bottles тоологдох → many; effort тоологдохгүй → little; идэвхгүй = can be recycled. 0: 'Much bottles' + 'few effort' алдаа. 2: 'can recycled' be дутуу. 3: 'few effort' алдаа (effort тоологдохгүй).

topics.pages_mn: Mother Nature and Wellness — Unit: Healthy Lifestyle (sport, brain, habits)

questions.stem_mn: Зайг нөх: 'Yoga is ___ boxing.' (calm)
questions.explanation_mn: calm богино тэмдэг нэр тул -er нэмж, than хэрэглэнэ → 'calmer than'. 'more'-г давхарлахгүй, 'then' биш 'than'.

questions.stem_mn: Зайг нөх: 'Water is ___ drink for your body.' (good)
questions.explanation_mn: good-ийн superlative нь irregular 'the best'. Superlative-д 'the' заавал хэрэгтэй; 'goodest' гэж хэлбэржүүлэхгүй.

questions.stem_mn: Тохирох үгийг сонго: 'I was very tired. ___, I finished the race.'
questions.explanation_mn: 'tired' ба 'finished the race' нь эсрэг санаа тул 'However' (гэвч) тохирно.

questions.stem_mn: Аль өгүүлбэр нь БУРУУ бэ?
choices: Jogging is more relaxing than running.
This gym is more bigger than that one.
She is the fittest player on the team.
questions.explanation_mn: 'more bigger' нь 'more' ба '-er'-ийг давхар хэрэглэсэн алдаа. Зөв нь 'bigger than'. Бусад гурав нь зөв.

questions.stem_mn: Аль өгүүлбэр нь зөв бэ?
choices: Sleeping early is better then staying up.
Sleeping early is better than staying up.
Sleeping early is more better than staying up.
Sleeping early is gooder than staying up.
questions.explanation_mn: Харьцуулахад 'than' хэрэглэнэ ('then' биш). better нь irregular тул 'more better', 'gooder' гэж хэлбэржүүлэхгүй. Зөв нь 'better than'.

questions.stem_mn: Тохирох үгийг сонго: 'Exercise helps your heart. ___, it improves your mood.'
questions.explanation_mn: Хоёр дахь санаа нь эхнийх дээр нэмэгдэж байгаа тул 'In addition' (нэмж хэлэхэд). 'than' нь transition word биш, харьцуулах үг.

questions.stem_mn: 'He trains daily. Therefore, he is very fit.' гэсэн өгүүлбэрт 'therefore' юуг заана вэ?
questions.explanation_mn: therefore (тиймээс, иймд) нь өмнөх санааны үр дүн, дүгнэлтийг заана: өдөр бүр дасгал хийдэг тул фит болжээ.

questions.stem_mn: Уншаад хариул: 'Swimming burns more calories than walking. However, running burns the most calories of all three.' Аль үйл ажиллагаа ХАМГИЙН их калори шатаах вэ?
questions.explanation_mn: 'running burns the most calories of all three' гэсэн superlative ('the most') нь running-ийг гурвуулангаас хамгийн их гэж заасан.

questions.stem_mn: Аль өгүүлбэр нь БҮРЭН зөв бэ?
choices: Tea is more healthier than soda, however I drink water.
Tea is healthier than soda. However, I drink water.
Tea is healthier then soda however I drink water.
Tea is the healthier than soda, however, I drink water.
questions.explanation_mn: healthier дээр 'more' давхарлахгүй, 'than' ('then' биш) хэрэглэнэ, comparative-д 'the' хэрэггүй, However-ийн дараа таслалтай → сонголт 2 бүрэн зөв.

questions.stem_mn: Аль superlative өгүүлбэр нь зөв бэ?
choices: Sleep is most important habit for health.
Sleep is the most important habit for health.
Sleep is the most importantest habit for health.
Sleep is more important habit for health.
questions.explanation_mn: Superlative-д 'the' заавал хэрэгтэй, урт тэмдэг нэрт 'the most important'. 'most importantest' давхар алдаа, 'more important' нь дээд зэрэг биш.

topics.pages_mn: Gateway to Success — Unit: Technology Today (drones, online learning, cyber safety)

questions.stem_mn: Зөв үйл үгийг сонго: She ___ me that she liked the new app.
questions.explanation_mn: 'tell' дараа нь хүн (me) шууд ордог тул 'told'. 'said' бол me-гүйгээр хэрэглэгддэг.

questions.stem_mn: Direct: "The internet is slow," he said. Reported: He said that the internet ___ slow.
questions.explanation_mn: Backshift: is (present) → was (past). Ганц тоо тул 'was'.

questions.stem_mn: Технологийн үгсийн сан: A ___ is a small flying machine controlled from the ground.
questions.explanation_mn: 'drone' нь газраас удирддаг жижиг нисдэг төхөөрөмж. Router (сүлжээ), browser (хөтөч), keyboard (гар) нь өөр утгатай.

questions.stem_mn: Зөв reported question-ийг сонго: She asked me ___.
questions.explanation_mn: Reported question-д энгийн эрэмбэ (subject + verb) + backshift: 'where the charger was'.

questions.stem_mn: Аль өгүүлбэр нь ЗӨВ бэ?
choices: He said me he was tired.
He said that where he was.
questions.explanation_mn: Backshift хийж 'was' болно, 'said' дараа me ордоггүй. Тиймээс 'He said he was tired.' зөв.

questions.stem_mn: Direct: "I bought a new laptop yesterday," she said. Reported: She said she had bought a new laptop ___.
questions.explanation_mn: yesterday → the day before гэж цаг хугацааны үг өөрчлөгдөнө.

questions.stem_mn: Direct: "Are you online?" he asked. Reported: He asked ___.
questions.explanation_mn: Yes/No асуултад 'if' + энгийн эрэмбэ + backshift: 'if I was online'.

questions.stem_mn: Direct: "You must protect your password," the expert said. Reported: The expert said that we ___ protect our password.
questions.explanation_mn: Reported speech-д 'must' (үүрэг) нь ихэвчлэн 'had to' болж ухардаг.

questions.stem_mn: Уншиж бод: During the cyber safety lesson a student asked, "How can hackers steal information?" Оюутны асуултыг аль нь ЗӨВ дамжуулж байна вэ?
choices: The student asked how could hackers steal information.
The student asked how hackers could steal information.
The student asked how can hackers steal information.
The student asked how hackers can steal information.
questions.explanation_mn: can → could (backshift) БА энгийн эрэмбэ (hackers could) байх ёстой. Тиймээс 'how hackers could steal information'.

questions.stem_mn: Аль өгүүлбэр нь БУРУУ бэ (алдаатай reported speech)?
choices: She told me that she had finished the online course.
He asked where I had saved the file.
They said that they were using a new app then.
She asked me what was my username.
questions.explanation_mn: 'what was my username' нь асуултын эрэмбэтэй тул БУРУУ. Зөв нь 'what my username was' (subject + verb).

topics.pages_mn: Gateway to Success — Unit: Sport & Entertainment (movies, celebrities, sports)

questions.stem_mn: The tennis match was very ___.
questions.explanation_mn: Тэмцээн нь мэдрэмж төрүүлэгч шинж чанартай тул -ing 'exciting' зөв.

questions.stem_mn: The children were ___ by the magician's tricks.
questions.explanation_mn: Хүүхдүүд гайхсан мэдрэмжийг мэдэрсэн тул past participle 'amazed' зөв.

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct sentence.
choices: He never is late for training.
He is never late for training.
Never he is late for training.
He is late never for training.
questions.explanation_mn: 'be' үйл үгийн ДАРАА давтамжийн adverb ордог тул 'He is never late...' зөв.

questions.stem_mn: The long marathon was ___, and the runners were completely ___ at the finish line.
questions.explanation_mn: Marathon нь шинж чанар → -ing 'tiring'; runners нь мэдрэмж мэдэрсэн → -ed 'tired'.

questions.stem_mn: Which sentence is INCORRECT?
choices: I am bored with this TV show.
I am boring with this TV show.
questions.explanation_mn: 'I am boring' гэвэл 'би уйтгартай хүн' гэсэн буруу утга гарна. Мэдрэмжээ хэлэхэд 'I am bored' гэх ёстой.

questions.stem_mn: Which of these is a noun phrase?
questions.explanation_mn: Noun phrase нь нэр үгийг төв болгож тодотгосон бүлэг үг — 'the world-famous tennis champion'. Бусад нь үйл үгийн бүлэг.

questions.stem_mn: A person who watches a sports event is a ___.
questions.explanation_mn: Тамирчны тэмцээн үзэгчийг 'spectator' гэнэ. 'spectacle' = үзвэр, 'spectacular' = гайхамшигтай (тэмдэг нэр).

questions.stem_mn: Read: 'The audience was thrilled by the spectacular half-time show. The performers, dressed in glittering costumes, were amazing.' How did the audience feel?
questions.explanation_mn: 'was thrilled' — audience нь мэдрэмжийг мэдэрсэн тул -ed 'thrilled'. Тэд өөрсдөө мэдэрсэн болохоос бусдад мэдрэмж төрүүлээгүй.

questions.stem_mn: Choose the correct sentence.
choices: Our team plays usually very well at home.
Our team usually plays very well at home.
Usually our team play very well at home.
Our team plays very well usually at home.
questions.explanation_mn: Давтамжийн adverb 'usually' нь үндсэн үйл үг 'plays'-ийн өмнө; хэв маягийн 'very well' нь үйл үгийн дараа. Тиймээс 'Our team usually plays very well...' зөв.

questions.stem_mn: 'The fans ___ outside the stadium were singing loudly.' (meaning: who were waiting)
questions.explanation_mn: Идэвхтэй утга (fans өөрсдөө хүлээж байсан) тул present participle 'waiting' (= who were waiting) зөв. Энэ нь relative clause-ийг богиносгосон хэлбэр.
